name: Farmers Fleet
statement: An event-driven logistics system deployed via Infrastructure as Code (IaC) on Google Kubernetes Engine. Designed to connect farmers and fleet through a centralized, real-time dispatch tower.

name: Store Locator & Discovery
statement: A cloud-native store locator application with discovery features showing five nearest stores on the map from a user's starting location. Uses Google Maps Platform APIs for location services.

name: SQL Data Warehouse Project
statement: A personal deep dive into SQL and Data Warehousing, implementing the Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, Gold) and Star Schema modeling.

name: Sand Gravel Ops
statement: A streamlined API for sand and gravel operations, designed to manage orders, track inventory, and monitor status.

name: Portfolio Website
statement: A compilation of cloud projects showcasing skills and resilience as a self-taught learner. Portfolio site is deployed on a serverless Cloud Run service.
